title: Otal barley
abstract: Otal was developed from a bulk of >400 F10 single-plant selections from the cross Otra (from Finland) X Weibull 1514-64 (from Sweden). Otal is a six-rowed spring feed barley with medium sized, long, narrow grains; its straw is ~8 cm shorter than that of Bonanza and it matures 7 days earlier, in 82-83 days. Otal contains more protein than Johnston, Bonanza and Galt. Its yield was 85.8% than of Galt in Alberta trials (1979-81)
